strengths: Possesses over 18 years of software engineering experience, easily exceeding the 15-year minimum requirement.
Strong entrepreneurial background as the Founder of GISCollective, demonstrating product ownership and platform building.
Holds a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science from MIT and has recent hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure.
concerns: Lacks the deep, recognized expertise in AI and Machine Learning expected for a Director-level AI strategy role.
AI experience appears limited to very recent tooling work, rather than a proven track record of guiding AI-powered product development.
Past roles are primarily Senior/Staff full-stack and web development, which may not translate to Director-level strategic leadership.
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer who meets the strict minimum requirements of a technical BS degree and 15+ years of engineering experience. His background as a founder and his community engagement through workshops show excellent initiative. However, for a Director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI Strategy, his resume lacks the deep, recognized expertise in artificial intelligence and machine learning required to advise enterprise customers and shape future AI platforms. His AI experience is very recent, making him a borderline candidate for such a highly specialized strategic role.
